title: Health score model hits 0.81 AUC this quarter
anchor: Third consecutive quarter of predictive lift, up from 0.74 last quarter and 0.67 two quarters ago.
connect: Override rate dropped to 11% from 17% last quarter as CSMs trust the model more.
body: Third consecutive quarter of predictive lift, up from 0.74 last quarter and 0.67 two quarters ago. Override rate dropped to 11% from 17% last quarter as CSMs trust the model more.
trace: Health model improvements showing compound gains in accuracy and adoption. CSM trust building as override rate declines with AUC gains.

title: CSM override rate sits at 11% across all coverage tiers
anchor: Down from the 24% peak earlier this year, with the trajectory declining quarter over quarter.
connect: Health score AUC climbed to 0.81 over the same period.
body: Down from the 24% peak earlier this year, with the trajectory declining quarter over quarter. Health score AUC climbed to 0.81 over the same period.
trace: Override rate trajectory inversely correlated with model accuracy gains. Peak override at 24% now down to 11% as predictive power improves.

title: 312 playbooks completed end-to-end in the last 30 days
anchor: First complete measurement of playbook completion rates since the platform shipped completion attribution on April 18.
connect: Prior periods unmeasurable due to missing completion event tracking.
body: First complete measurement of playbook completion rates since the platform shipped completion attribution on April 18. Prior periods unmeasurable due to missing completion event tracking.
trace: Playbook completion visibility now available for the first time. Baseline established at 312 completions monthly.

title: Real-time product telemetry goes live April 18
anchor: Mixpanel-to-CS-platform sync moved from 3-day batch delays to minute-level signal delivery.
connect: Health score model now reacts to usage spikes within minutes instead of 72 hours later.
body: Mixpanel-to-CS-platform sync moved from 3-day batch delays to minute-level signal delivery. Health score model now reacts to usage spikes within minutes instead of 72 hours later.
trace: Infrastructure upgrade eliminates the 3-day signal delay that prevented the health model from catching usage spikes in real-time.

title: Likelihood-to-renew model enters shadow production
anchor: Probabilistic layer launched April 21 runs alongside the composite health score.
connect: Both models now produce parallel histories for direct comparison and calibration.
body: Probabilistic layer launched April 21 runs alongside the composite health score. Both models now produce parallel histories for direct comparison and calibration.
trace: Second model architecture in validation mode. Shadow production allows direct comparison between composite score approach and probabilistic likelihood approach.

title: 47 accounts move from mid-touch to high-touch coverage
anchor: Segmentation refresh based on 14 months of usage and renewal data replaces onboarding tier assignments.
connect: New playbook routing begins Q3 2026 with the updated coverage model.
body: Segmentation refresh based on 14 months of usage and renewal data replaces onboarding tier assignments. New playbook routing begins Q3 2026 with the updated coverage model.
trace: Data-driven segmentation replaces static onboarding assignments. 47 accounts reclassified upward based on actual behavior patterns.

title: Handoff data completeness climbs to 84% across Q2 deals
anchor: 24 closed-won handoffs include stakeholder maps, buying reasons, and verbal commitments versus 41% in Q1.
connect: Day-0 health score accuracy improves with richer handoff records from Sales.
body: 24 closed-won handoffs include stakeholder maps, buying reasons, and verbal commitments versus 41% in Q1. Day-0 health score accuracy improves with richer handoff records from Sales.
trace: Sales-to-CS handoff quality doubling quarter-over-quarter. Health model benefits from complete stakeholder and context data at customer start.

title: Salesforce sync uptime holds at 99.7% in March
anchor: Above the 99% reliability threshold with nightly handoff freshness maintained.
connect: Health model signal reliability depends on consistent CRM data flow.
body: Above the 99% reliability threshold with nightly handoff freshness maintained. Health model signal reliability depends on consistent CRM data flow.
trace: Infrastructure stability supports model reliability. Salesforce sync performance within operational thresholds.

title: BigQuery feature-usage pipeline approved for Q2
anchor: Replaces proxy login-frequency signals currently feeding the health score model.
connect: Real feature-usage data will replace login approximations in the model architecture.
body: Replaces proxy login-frequency signals currently feeding the health score model. Real feature-usage data will replace login approximations in the model architecture.
trace: Model input quality upgrade scheduled. Proxy login signals replaced with actual feature engagement data from the data warehouse.

title: CS tool consolidation frees 40% of connector overhead
anchor: 3 legacy tools retired in Q1 with reduced integration maintenance load.
connect: Admin bandwidth now available for health model improvement work.
body: 3 legacy tools retired in Q1 with reduced integration maintenance load. Admin bandwidth now available for health model improvement work.
trace: Infrastructure simplification creates capacity for model development. Tool retirement reduces maintenance overhead.

title: Custom Permissions launch connects to Beacon Logistics renewal
anchor: March 8 feature launch leads to 21 consecutive green health days, early renewal conversation April 2, contract signed April 14.
connect: Full product-event-to-renewal attribution visible in the health model pipeline.
body: March 8 feature launch leads to 21 consecutive green health days, early renewal conversation April 2, contract signed April 14. Full product-event-to-renewal attribution visible in the health model pipeline.
trace: End-to-end attribution story from product launch through health score response to early renewal. Model successfully traces feature adoption to contract outcome.

title: Onboarding completion hits 89% across Q1 cohort
anchor: 9 customer onboardings completed with activation milestones feeding back as model signals.
connect: Completion data enriches health score inputs for newly onboarded accounts.
body: 9 customer onboardings completed with activation milestones feeding back as model signals. Completion data enriches health score inputs for newly onboarded accounts.
trace: Onboarding success metrics now feed the health model. High completion rate provides clean signal quality for new customer scoring.

title: Mid-market NRR holds at 117% for third consecutive quarter
anchor: Q3 2025, Q4 2025, and Q1 2026 all above the 110% benchmark threshold.
connect: Segmentation model calibration benefits from consistent cohort performance data.
body: Q3 2025, Q4 2025, and Q1 2026 all above the 110% benchmark threshold. Segmentation model calibration benefits from consistent cohort performance data.
trace: Mid-market segment performance stability provides reliable data for segmentation model tuning and coverage tier assignments.

title: Annual CS benchmark data expected April 30
anchor: Current segmentation model runs on 2025 industry data with fresh ratios arriving this month.
connect: Updated benchmark enables coverage tier tuning versus current industry baseline.
body: Current segmentation model runs on 2025 industry data with fresh ratios arriving this month. Updated benchmark enables coverage tier tuning versus current industry baseline.
trace: Annual benchmark refresh cycle provides updated industry data for model calibration. Current model built on prior-year data.

title: Playbook completion attribution ships in CS platform update
anchor: April 18 release enables completion event tracking at the playbook level for the first time.
connect: Platform now exports completion events for outcome attribution measurement.
body: April 18 release enables completion event tracking at the playbook level for the first time. Platform now exports completion events for outcome attribution measurement.
trace: Platform feature unlock creates new measurement capability. Playbook ROI and effectiveness now measurable through completion event data.

title: Health model runs three consecutive AUC improvement quarters
anchor: 0.67 to 0.74 to 0.81 trajectory shows compound predictive gains.
connect: Each iteration adds real signals and removes proxy approximations.
body: 0.67 to 0.74 to 0.81 trajectory shows compound predictive gains. Each iteration adds real signals and removes proxy approximations.
trace: Model improvement velocity consistent across three quarters. Signal quality upgrades driving predictive power gains.

title: Real-time telemetry eliminates 72-hour signal delays
anchor: Usage spikes now reach the health model within minutes of the underlying product event.
connect: Prior batch processing created 3-day windows where expansion signals went unseen.
body: Usage spikes now reach the health model within minutes of the underlying product event. Prior batch processing created 3-day windows where expansion signals went unseen.
trace: Infrastructure upgrade compresses signal latency from days to minutes. Health model responsiveness to usage patterns dramatically improved.

title: Coverage tier refresh targets Q3 2026 implementation
anchor: 47 accounts reclassified based on 14 months of behavioral data versus initial onboarding assignments.
connect: New playbook routing begins with the updated tier assignments next quarter.
body: 47 accounts reclassified based on 14 months of behavioral data versus initial onboarding assignments. New playbook routing begins with the updated tier assignments next quarter.
trace: Segmentation model moves from static onboarding tiers to dynamic behavioral classification. Implementation scheduled for Q3 with new playbook routing.

title: Shadow model produces parallel scoring history
anchor: Likelihood-to-renew layer runs alongside composite scores since April 21.
connect: Direct model comparison enables architecture evaluation without production risk.
body: Likelihood-to-renew layer runs alongside composite scores since April 21. Direct model comparison enables architecture evaluation without production risk.
trace: Parallel model deployment strategy allows safe evaluation of probabilistic versus composite scoring approaches through direct comparison.

title: Feature-usage pipeline replaces login proxy signals
anchor: BigQuery extraction approved for Q2 will feed actual product engagement data into the health model.
connect: Login frequency approximations replaced with granular feature adoption metrics.
body: BigQuery extraction approved for Q2 will feed actual product engagement data into the health model. Login frequency approximations replaced with granular feature adoption metrics.
trace: Model input quality improvement scheduled. Proxy login metrics replaced with direct feature engagement measurements from product telemetry.
